utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Now check the final package: (1) destination → Lisbon, Portugal (fully specified). (2) travel_dates → 2024-07-01 to 2024-07-06 (fully specified). (3) transportation → includes airline, departure/arrival airports, class, and total cost (€400) — fully specified. (4) accommodation → includes hotel name, type, total cost, and amenities — fully specified. (5) activities → includes a list of activities and total cost (€120) — fully specified. (6) additional_services → includes restaurant (name, cuisine, style, cost) and travel insurance — fully specified. (7) total_budget → includes grand total, budget limit, and remaining — fully specified. Therefore, all 7 items are covered and complete.
